title: geranium molle subsp. villosum
intro: Geranium molle subsp. villosum is a subspecies of the perennial herb Geranium molle, native to the Mediterranean region. It is a small, hairy plant with clusters of small, pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Geranium molle subsp. villosum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which have been traditionally used to treat conditions like eczema, acne, and minor burns, providing health benefits such as soothing and calming the skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing.
